nasb.text: Deliver me, I pray, from the hand of my brother, from the hand of Esau; for I fear him, that he will come and attack me and the mothers with the children.

esv.text: Please deliver me from the hand of my brother, from the hand of Esau, for I fear him, that he may come and attack me, the mothers with the children.

cnv.text: 求你救我脫離我哥哥以掃的手，因為我怕他來擊殺我，連母親和孩子也擊殺了。

ccb.text: 求你救我脱离我哥哥以扫的手，我怕他会来杀我和我的妻儿。

csbs.text: 求你救我脱离我哥哥以扫的手，因为我畏惧他，恐怕他来击杀我，连母亲和孩子也一同击杀。
